subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou at Whose separation the near ones lament and by Whose utterance the sincere are drawn! I beseech Thee by the light of Thy Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من فی هجرک ناح المقربون و ببیانک انجذب المخلصون اسئلک بنور امرک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
